query:
INSERT INTO product_service_specs (
                id,
                product_id,
                tenant_id,
                api_limits,
                sla,
                technical_specs,
                support_info,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                api_limits = VALUES(api_limits),
                sla = VALUES(sla),
                technical_specs = VALUES(technical_specs),
                support_info = VALUES(support_info),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
